zh.West Lavington, Wiltshire, England: 英國維爾爾韋斯特 拉維頓
zh.Bratton, Wiltshire, England, United King: 英國英格蘭維爾爾布拉頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Bower於1578年出生在英國維爾爾布拉頓時，她的父親Francis Bowyer II27歲，母親Ann Hurlbut16歲。她於1601年10月26日與Sefton Bromwich在英國維爾爾韋斯特 拉維頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1614年11月22日在她的家鄉享年36歲。

zh-hans.West Lavington, Wiltshire, England: 英国維爾爾韋斯特 拉維頓
zh-hans.Bratton, Wiltshire, England, United King: 英国英格兰維爾爾布拉頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Bower于1578年出生在英国維爾爾布拉頓时，她的父亲Francis Bowyer II27岁，母亲Ann Hurlbut16岁。她于1601年10月26日与Sefton Bromwich在英国維爾爾韋斯特 拉維頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1614年11月22日在她的家乡享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bower
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English bour, bor(e), bur(e) (Old English būr) ‘cottage, chamber, bower’, denoting either a ‘cottager’ or ‘chamber-servant’, or a topographic name for someone who lived in a small cottage, or a habitational name from any of various minor places called from this word in Somerset, Sussex, Essex, and Peeblesshire. Compare Bowerman and Bowring .
English: variant of Bowyer , for a maker or seller of bows or an archer, from Middle English bowyere, an agent derivative of Old English boga ‘bow’.
Americanized form of German   Bauer   ‘peasant’ or ‘neighbor, fellow citizen’, or of its Dutch cognate   Bouwer  .

variants.name: Bover
meanings: English (Essex): status name from Middle English bovier ‘peasant’ (Old French bovier, buvier ‘oxherd’; compare 2 below). In the Middle Ages there was some confusion Bower and perhaps also Bowyer .
Catalan: occupational name for a herdsman, from Catalan bover ‘oxherd, cowherd’ (from Late Latin bovarius).

variants.name: Bowerman
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English bureman, meaing either ‘chamberer, personal servant’ or ‘cottager’. See Bower 1.
Americanized form of German Bauermann, a variant of Bauer .

variants.name: Bowring
meanings: English: topographic name from Middle English bouring (Old English būring), a derivative of Old English būr ‘bower, cottage, hall’, probably denoting a cottager or perhaps one who worked at a hall (see Bower ).

variants.name: Bowers
meanings: English: variant of Bower , with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Bower was born in 1578, in Bratton, Wiltshire, England, her father, Francis Bowyer II, was 27 and her mother, Ann Hurlbut, was 16. She married Sefton Bromwich on 26 October 1601, in West Lavington, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 22 November 1614, in her hometown, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Bower est née en 1578, à Bratton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Francis Bowyer II, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Ann Hurlbut, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Sefton Bromwich le 26 octobre 1601, à West Lavington, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 novembre 1614, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Bower 1578 in Bratton, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Francis Bowyer II 27 und ihre Mutter Ann Hurlbut 16. Sie hat am 26. Oktober 1601 in West Lavington, Wiltshire, England Sefton Bromwich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. November 1614 im Alter von 36 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Bower è nata il nel 1578 nel Bratton, Wiltshire, England, sua padre, Francis Bowyer II, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Ann Hurlbut, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Sefton Bromwich il 26 ottobre 1601, nel West Lavington, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 22 novembre 1614, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Bowerが1578年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアブラットオンで生まれた時，父Francis Bowyer IIは27歳，母Ann Hurlbutは16歳であった。1601年10月26日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアウエスト ラヴィントンでSefton Bromwichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1614年11月22日に故郷で36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Bower(이)가 1578년 영국 윌츠히르 브래턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Francis Bowyer II(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ann Hurlbut(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1601년 10월 26일 영국 윌츠히르 웨스트 래빙턴에서 Sefton Bromwich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1614년 11월 22일 그녀의 고향에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Bower nasceu em 1578, em Bratton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Francis Bowyer II, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Ann Hurlbut, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Sefton Bromwich em 26 de outubro de 1601, em West Lavington, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de novembro de 1614, em sua cidade natal, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Bower родилась в 1578 г. в местности браттон, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Francis Bowyer II было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Hurlbut, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sefton Bromwich 26 октября 1601 г. в местности вест лавингтон, уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 22 ноября 1614 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Bower nació en 1578, en Bratton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Francis Bowyer II, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Ann Hurlbut, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Sefton Bromwich el 26 de octubre de 1601, en West Lavington, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 22 de noviembre de 1614, en su pueblo, a la edad de 36 años.
